creator: bf2006a@yahoo.com

diff -ruN unrtf.orig/Makefile unrtf/Makefile
--- unrtf.orig/Makefile	Thu Jul 13 19:25:14 2006
+++ unrtf/Makefile	Sun Jun 17 02:53:04 2007
@@ -5,7 +5,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD: ports/textproc/unrtf/Makefile,v 1.16 2006/07/13 23:25:14 rafan Exp $
 
 PORTNAME=	unrtf
-PORTVERSION=	0.20.2
+PORTVERSION=	0.20.3
 CATEGORIES=	textproc
 MASTER_SITES=	${MASTER_SITE_GNU}
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	${PORTNAME}
diff -ruN unrtf.orig/distinfo unrtf/distinfo
--- unrtf.orig/distinfo	Thu Jul 13 19:25:14 2006
+++ unrtf/distinfo	Sun Jun 17 02:54:31 2007
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-MD5 (unrtf_0.20.2.tar.gz) = 6f2cfe9c94ab61f698c08ca8c07cac67
-SHA256 (unrtf_0.20.2.tar.gz) = c5f52ce0fe2ec4c8594ef521e42da3c51b3753f6b328c39e2ba4124892da68d6
-SIZE (unrtf_0.20.2.tar.gz) = 411003
+MD5 (unrtf_0.20.3.tar.gz) = 290280d23a0ee631125a705930345cdd
